## Task Description
Apply flexbox layout to an element that has more than two children. Use at least three flexbox-related attributes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] display: flex applied
- [ ] More than two children within the flex container
- [ ] At least 3 flexbox properties used (e.g. justify-content, align-items, flex-wrap)
- [ ] Pushed via Pull Request

## Related Lab Section
Part 2 - CSS / Layouts / Flexbox
